title: Number Representation & Place Value
objective: Students will explore number representation & place value concepts including Reading and writing numbers to 20, The teen numbers, Number Words to Twenty and more.

steps.content: Let's explore Reading and writing numbers to 20! Have you ever wondered about this?
Read and write numerals from 0 to 20
Time to try this out: Read any numeral 0–20 when shown it
Can you read a number like '17' written on paper and write it themselves — and do they know what each digit means?
Great job! Today we learned about Reading and writing numbers to 20. Read any numeral 0–20 when shown it Write numerals 0–20 legibly from dictation
Have you ever thought about The teen numbers? Let's find out together!
Understand that the teen numbers (11–19) are composed of ten ones and some further ones (early place value)
Let's practice together! Compose 14 as a group of ten and four ones using objects
If you has 14 building blocks, can they see it as one full tower of 10 and 4 left over — understanding 'teen' numbers as ten-and-some-more?
Great job! Today we learned about The teen numbers. Compose 14 as a group of ten and four ones using objects Decompose 17 into 10 + 7 and record as an equation
Let's explore Number Words to Twenty! Have you ever wondered about this?
Read and write number words from one to twenty
Let's practice together! Read the word 'twelve' and identify it as 12
Can you write number words like 'fourteen' or 'twenty' — and read them on a birthday card or in a story book without needing help?
Amazing work! Let's review what we discovered about Number Words to Twenty. Read the word 'twelve' and identify it as 12 Write the word form of a given number 1–20
Today we're going to learn about Reading and writing numbers to 100. Get ready for an adventure!
Read and write numerals from 0 to 100
Let's practice together! Read two-digit numerals up to 100 correctly
Can you read and write any number up to 100 — both as a numeral and by saying what it means?
Great job! Today we learned about Reading and writing numbers to 100. Read two-digit numerals up to 100 correctly Write any number 0–100 as a numeral from dictation
